name: personal-skills
description: Rodrigo Azevedo's personal Agent Skills, each installable as an independent plugin.

plugins.name: requirements-gap-analysis
plugins.description: Compares project notes (e.g. CLAUDE.md) to the actual codebase and annotates gaps with TODO comments in the relevant source files.

plugins.name: writing-great-skills
plugins.description: Reference for writing and editing skills well — the vocabulary and principles that make a skill predictable.
